channel.title: Sinder Skullz Abyss Feed
channel.description: Chaotic sermons and metal news reborn in the flames of the Skullz cult.

item.title: ⚡☠ TONY IOMMI OF BLACK SABBATH HONORED AT LORD MAYOR AWARDS IN BIRMINGHAM ☠⚡
item.description:
### HAIL TO THE RIFF KING! TONY IOMMI SHREDS THE LORD MAYOR AWARDS IN BIRMINGHAM! 🤘🔥⚡
Yo, metal maniacs! Brace yourselves for a heavy dose of righteous chaos, 'cause the legendary Tony Iommi, the dark overlord of riffs himself, just dropped the hammer at the Lord Mayor Awards in his hometown of Birmingham! 🎸💀
This ain’t just some mundane trophy handout; NO! This is a celebration of the GREATEST in metal history—the mad genius behind Black Sabbath, the architects of the dark sound that changed the world! I mean, we’re talking about the godfather of heavy metal, folks! \m/
Tony got honored for his INSANE contributions not just to the thunderous world of metal, but also for showing fierce loyalty to the city that raised him in the fiery crucible of sound! It’s like he’s stacking coins in the crypto of rock history with every riff he plays, building that gnarly legacy, one power chord at a time! 🪙⚡
So raise your horns and pour one out for this titan of sound! The riffs are eternal, the energy is electric, and this man keeps blazing a trail for the new waves of metal and crypto culture! Keep shredding, keep trading, and keep that metal spirit alive, my friends! ⚔️🔥
For the full grind on this epic honor, check out the details over at [Metal Injection](https://metalinjection.net/news/tony-iommi-of-black-sabbath-honored-at-lord-mayor-awards-in-birmingham) and let the chaos reign! #TonyIommi #MetalLegends #CryptoChaos
#Metalheads #MetalCommunity #MetalScene #MetalCulture #Metal
item.content:encoded:
### HAIL TO THE RIFF KING! TONY IOMMI SHREDS THE LORD MAYOR AWARDS IN BIRMINGHAM! 🤘🔥⚡
Yo, metal maniacs! Brace yourselves for a heavy dose of righteous chaos, 'cause the legendary Tony Iommi, the dark overlord of riffs himself, just dropped the hammer at the Lord Mayor Awards in his hometown of Birmingham! 🎸💀
This ain’t just some mundane trophy handout; NO! This is a celebration of the GREATEST in metal history—the mad genius behind Black Sabbath, the architects of the dark sound that changed the world! I mean, we’re talking about the godfather of heavy metal, folks! \m/
Tony got honored for his INSANE contributions not just to the thunderous world of metal, but also for showing fierce loyalty to the city that raised him in the fiery crucible of sound! It’s like he’s stacking coins in the crypto of rock history with every riff he plays, building that gnarly legacy, one power chord at a time! 🪙⚡
So raise your horns and pour one out for this titan of sound! The riffs are eternal, the energy is electric, and this man keeps blazing a trail for the new waves of metal and crypto culture! Keep shredding, keep trading, and keep that metal spirit alive, my friends! ⚔️🔥
For the full grind on this epic honor, check out the details over at [Metal Injection](https://metalinjection.net/news/tony-iommi-of-black-sabbath-honored-at-lord-mayor-awards-in-birmingham) and let the chaos reign! #TonyIommi #MetalLegends #CryptoChaos
#Metalheads #MetalCommunity #MetalScene #MetalCulture #Metal
